narrative:
Bedford / Washington (precinct in Coshocton County) has 850 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points.
